summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kozbeyli Konagi hotel management system. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tested across all 10 pages with sidebar navigation, forms, and CRUD operations working correctly.

issues: Occupancy bar not visible at top of page (truncated by animation)
Total rooms stat card shows '16' but number is cut off on first load
Send button may be blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay at bottom right - requires force=True to click

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent components in Tasks, Events, Guests pages - should add aria-describedby for accessibility
ESLint warnings: useEffect missing dependency 'load' in GuestsPage.js, KnowledgeBasePage.js, MessagesPage.js, TasksPage.js - should wrap load in useCallback or add to dependency array
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing: TEST_Gorev, TEST_Etkinlik, TEST_Misafir - automatically cleaned up or left for demo
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 19+ API endpoints tested and working. Gemini AI chatbot integration working. WhatsApp webhook simulation working. All 10 navigation pages functional. 'Made with Emergent' badge may intercept clicks at bottom-right - use force=True in Playwright scripts.

backend_apis: GET /api/health - healthy status with DB connection
GET /api/dashboard/stats - returns total_rooms=16, occupancy_rate, platform ratings
GET /api/rooms - returns 4 room types with TL and EUR prices
GET /api/menu - returns full restaurant menu with 12 categories
POST /api/whatsapp/webhook - WhatsApp message processed with AI reply
frontend_pages: Dashboard - stats, platform ratings, recent tasks displayed
Rooms - 4 room types with TL/EUR prices
AI Chatbot - chat input, quick messages, send/receive working
Knowledge Base - page loads (empty state shown)
